analysis_plan_ref.anchor: SS5 Endpoints, statistics, and honest power (ANALYSIS PLAN)

arms_mandatory_baselines: flat ensemble (48 flat cells) re-adjudicated under the IDENTICAL blind human protocol in the same arm-mixed pinned queue - the matched baseline arm; neither arm gets a different instrument
frozen LLM-proxy final verdicts (pinned in data/s5-human-readj/key.json, reproduction-checked against results-s5-v2.json fail-closed) - the comparison channel; never re-run, never shown to humans

kernel-as-text and shuffled-kernel controls N/A BY CONSTRUCTION (dropped-arms disclosure, PROTOCOL SS8): no model-under-test and no kernel-in-context arm exists in an adjudication-channel experiment over existing artefacts; nothing is generated

dependent_vars.definition: final human verdict per judged cell under the pinned rubric + reconciliation rule (concordant binary -> that verdict; concordant CANNOT-SAY -> LOSSY ITT; discordant -> pinned blind reconciliation, UNRESOLVED -> LOSSY ITT; exhausted cell -> LOSSY ITT, never shown)
dependent_vars.name: cell_faithful_human

dependent_vars.definition: best-of-two ensemble outcome per concept per arm on human gold, matched to the re-pilot registered primary (DESIGN-v2 SS2): E2H = 1 iff any of the arm's two cells is human-final FAITHFUL; ITT, all 24 concepts analyzable
dependent_vars.name: concept_e2_human

dependent_vars.definition: pre-reconciliation independent two-judge agreement, overall and by arm (gate G-HRA input)
dependent_vars.name: human_judge_agreement

dependent_vars.definition: cell-level disagreement between the pinned frozen proxy finals and the human finals on the 93 proxy-binary cells, per arm; the registered localizer for whether the proxy pathology was arm-differential; plus concept-level E2 flip counts and sign_flipped_vs_proxy
dependent_vars.name: proxy_human_disagreement
dependent_vars.unit: percent per arm + pp arm gap

n_planned.arm_split: 48 flat + 47 ref-bearing mol (conception.mol-fable exhausted, ITT LOSSY, never shown)
n_planned.dropped_secondaries: re-pilot cascade and mean-quality secondaries are NOT re-measured: quality is not elicited from humans (rubric delta 3) and the cascade selector consumes arm-side self-flag metadata this channel does not touch - disclosed, PROTOCOL SS5
n_planned.human_effort_estimate: STIPULATED planning figure, never emitted as a measurement: 2-5 min/item x 95 items x 2 adjudicators ~ 6-16 h independent passes + reconciliation of the discordant set
n_planned.power: honest and fixed (ASM-2462): n=24 concepts is inherited, not chosen; simulated at the observed discordance ~9/24 the significance clause has power ~0.13 at +15pp, ~0.41 at +25pp, ~0.61 at +30pp, ~0.84 at +35pp; MDE80 ~ +33pp; the TOST NULL at the +-15pp MCID is essentially unreachable (pass prob <= ~0.05 at true delta 0) and is pre-declared uninformative by absence; the registered deliverables are the SIGN under the exhaustive unresolved bracket, the Tango interval, and the 93-cell proxy-vs-human disagreement analysis
n_planned.stopping_rule: fixed: exactly one independent pass per adjudicator + one reconciliation pass; no interim looks, no re-judging

endpoints.test: EXACTLY ONE primary, matched to the re-pilot registered primary but on HUMAN gold: paired concept-level ensemble E2H over the 24 concepts (ITT; exhausted/unresolved/concordant-escape cells LOSSY), delta = (c-b)/24 in pp where b = flat-only-FAITHFUL and c = mol-only-FAITHFUL discordant concepts; exact two-sided McNemar over the discordant pairs (/analysis/mcnemar_exact_p) with Tango (1998) asymptotic score 95% CI (/analysis/tango95_ci_pp), statistics ported verbatim from the pinned re-pilot scorer. Sign booleans are robust over the exhaustive unresolved-resolution bracket (/analysis/delta_pp_unresolved_min, /analysis/delta_pp_unresolved_max): sign_flip_confirmed = delta>0 AND p<0.05 AND bracket-min>0; sign_nonpositive = delta<=0 AND bracket-max<=0; a straddling bracket reaches neither. TOST at the registered +-15pp MCID via the Tango 90% CI (/analysis/tost_equivalence_pass), pre-declared essentially unreachable at n=24 (ASM-2462).

instrument characterization, gate-adjacent: pre-reconciliation raw3/raw/kappa/AC1 + seeded boot95 overall (/analysis/human_raw3 et al.) and by arm (/analysis/human_agreement_by_arm); kappa<0.40 sets /analysis/instrument_unreliable_disclosure (disclosure, not a gate; mirrors ASM-2402 discipline); the binding gate is raw3>=0.70 in G-HRA

the panel-instability localizer: cell-level proxy-vs-human disagreement percent per arm on the 93 proxy-binary cells (/analysis/proxy_human_disagree_flat_pct, _mol_pct) and their gap in pp; descriptive, no hypothesis test; large mol-side gap is consistent with the arm-differential pathology the proxy agreement numbers showed (kappa 0.2679 mol vs 0.4851 flat)

the registered answer to 'does the human channel flip the sign the proxy panel measured?': true iff human delta_pp > 0 while the pinned proxy delta_pp (-4.2, reproduction-checked) <= 0; point-estimate level, distinct from the significance-bearing primary boolean
per-generator paired deltas (luna, fable) with the same McNemar+Tango machinery, matching the re-pilot secondaries; nominal, no multiplicity claim

the fail-closed sensitivity bracket: primary delta recomputed under every possible resolution of UNRESOLVED cells (<=16 combinations under the gate cap); min/max reported; the primary sign booleans consume this bracket (ASM-2460)
concept-level E2 flips human-vs-proxy per arm (flat_gain/flat_loss/mol_gain/mol_loss): where the channels disagree at the endpoint level, not just the cell level; descriptive

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any outcome: claims are scoped to THESE 95 frozen records - 24 fitted WordNet-stride concepts, 2 generators, the v2.1 expanded rendering, this rubric, these two pseudonymous kernel-naive adjudicators - and to the E2 best-of-two oracle ensemble, which is a ceiling, not a deployable yield. n=24 licenses a SIGN and an interval, never a magnitude claim, never confirmation (MDE80 ~ +33pp; the TOST NULL is disclosed as essentially unreachable at this n). Nothing here validates the molaug-v0 inventory, licenses any deployable-yield or coverage-general claim, or speaks to any concept distribution beyond the pinned sample. The proxy-vs-human disagreement analysis characterizes THIS proxy panel on THESE items only - it licenses no general claim about LLM judges. No scale language of any kind is licensed.
hypotheses: H-CONCEAL (the reading this design can support): proxy-judge noise, not record content, produced the re-pilot's non-positive E2 delta; on human gold the molecule arm's E2 exceeds the flat arm's (delta > 0), robust across the unresolved-resolution bracket

H-CORROBORATE (the reading this design can kill H-CONCEAL with): the sign is real; human gold reproduces a non-positive delta under the ITT primary and under every unresolved resolution, and the molecule-S5 PIVOT stands corroborated by a channel containing no LLM judge

H-CHANNEL (instrument characterization, gate-scoped): two kernel-naive humans under the checklist rubric agree at raw3 >= 0.70 (the proxy panel measured 0.6774), else the channel is INSTRUMENT-INVALID and adjudicates nothing
kill_criterion_verbatim: s5-human-readj is an independent-channel SIGN-CHECK over the 95 existing re-pilot fidelity records, PROXY-PROVISIONAL-replacing on exactly one axis (judge pathology): H-CONCEAL is DEAD iff sign_nonpositive - the human-gold E2 delta is <= 0pp under the ITT primary AND under every resolution of unresolved cells - and the molecule-S5 PIVOT then stands corroborated by a channel with no LLM judge in it; no further human re-adjudication of these 95 records may be proposed. A verdict of PASS (sign_flip_confirmed) licenses exactly ONE action: registering a fresh, properly powered human-gold molecule-S5 successor before any re-opening of the molecule-S5 line. This experiment CANNOT move the programme CORRECTNESS verdict-word alone, in either direction, at any outcome; it cannot un-fire the re-pilot PIVOT retroactively; gate failure is INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never evidence about the records.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: builder poc/scale/molecule-aug/human-readj/build_kit.py sha256 a089e706b5634da426b0a910a39278b8354e8a42dee4ce1a9d204847ded19e28 (deterministic re-packaging of the frozen stage1-repilot artefacts; fail-closed provenance + proxy-reproduction oracle; byte-idempotent). Human answer sheets are PINNED-AT-INPUTS: the coordinator sha256-pins both raw CSVs in the run log BEFORE revealing any discordant item, and the consensus CSV before analysis.

runner_constraints.blinding_custody: key.json is coordinator-only and is not needed until analysis; sheets are built from answers-template.csv + items/ which are arm-free by construction (PROTOCOL SS3, skeptic S-4)
runner_constraints.compute: CPU-seconds only (the pinned analysis); no GPU, no API spend
runner_constraints.executor: coordinator (builds the two spreadsheets from the arm-free corpus files, recruits judge-H1/judge-H2, runs the reconciliation, runs the pinned analysis); the designer runs nothing
runner_constraints.no_llm: NO LLM call anywhere in the channel: judging, tie-break, reconciliation, transcription (ASM-2459); transcription is mechanical copy spot-checked against the pinned item shas
runner_constraints.sheet_pinning: both raw CSVs sha256-pinned in the run log BEFORE any discordant item is revealed; consensus CSV pinned before analysis; edits after pinning require a fresh sheet + fresh hash, disclosed

title: s5-human-readj - 2-human blind fidelity re-adjudication of the 95 EXISTING molecule-S5 re-pilot records (48 flat + 47 ref-bearing molecule cells; the exhausted conception.mol-fable cell retained ITT NOT-FAITHFUL): an independent, judge-pathology-free correctness channel testing whether the LLM-proxy panel's instability (kappa 0.3816 overall, 0.2679 on the treatment arm) concealed the sign of the E2 delta the PIVOT fired on; arm-blind arm-mixed presentation in one pinned shuffled order, criterial-feature checklist rubric matched to the frozen v2.1 proxy instrument, pinned blind reconciliation with fail-closed ITT and an exhaustive unresolved-resolution sensitivity bracket; ONE matched primary (paired concept-level E2 on human gold, exact McNemar + Tango95) + TOST at the 15pp MCID + the registered proxy-vs-human disagreement analysis; design+freeze only, coordinator executes (approved coordination decision 45 option 2)
